## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? One paragraph is enough. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Community data update (`community/*.yml`)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest backend/tests/`)
- [ ] `DESIGN.md` updated if schema, data model, or architecture changed
- [ ] Community data validated (`python scripts/validate_community.py`) — if applicable
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] PR targets the correct branch (`dev` for features, `main` for releases)
